vocab.meaning: một cử chỉ thể hiện sự kính trọng sâu sắc
vocab.example: Being presented with a vintage watch by my professor was a gesture of profound esteem that I will always value.

vocab.meaning: báo hiệu/mở ra một chương mới
vocab.example: My father gave me a chronometer when I started my first job to herald a new chapter of financial independence.

vocab.meaning: mang lại một nét sang trọng/đẳng cấp
vocab.example: The silver timepiece I received for my birthday really helps to impart a touch of class to even my most casual outfits.

vocab.meaning: độ chính xác cực cao về mặt thời gian
vocab.example: I was gifted a high-end Swiss watch known for its chronometric precision, which is essential for my field of work.

vocab.meaning: đạt được cảm giác thuộc về (một tập thể/truyền thống)
vocab.example: Receiving the family's traditional gold watch made me feel I had finally attained a sense of belonging within the lineage.

vocab.meaning: sự linh hoạt trong cách phối đồ/phong cách ăn mặc
vocab.example: What I love about the watch I was gifted is its sartorial versatility; it fits perfectly with both formal suits and weekend wear.

vocab.meaning: một mối liên kết bền chặt/trường tồn
vocab.example: To me, the watch isn't just an accessory but a symbol of the enduring bond I share with my best friend who gave it to me.

vocab.meaning: tỏa ra sự tinh tế/sành điệu
vocab.example: The minimalist watch I won in the competition radiates sophistication without being overly flashy.

vocab.meaning: một món quà bất ngờ mang tính thực tế cao
vocab.example: Getting a high-quality smartwatch as a graduation gift was a practical windfall that helped me manage my fitness and schedule.

vocab.meaning: phản ánh đúng tính cách của người nhận
vocab.example: The rugged, durable watch my brother chose for me perfectly mirrors my character as an avid hiker and outdoorsman.
